response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; their resume shows senior/staff-level responsibilities since 2014, with no indication of seeking a stepping-stone position, and their German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple production systems
Strong full-stack exposure including React, REST APIs, and PostgreSQL-like SQL usage
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and contribute to dev-ops/infrastructure
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior/staff roles, likely to be underutilized or leave quickly
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
No clear evidence of recent React or Nest.js use, and no AWS/Kubernetes exposure despite nice-to-haves
